>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - 摇一摇有优惠（品牌商户）文档索引

> 摇一摇有优惠是微信支付的支付后互动营销功能，依据用户消费偏好在支付完成页快速发放优惠，简化领券与核销链路，帮助商户提升复购、实现精细化运营，使用前需完成商家名片配置或品牌门店创建。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4015782176.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4017418651.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016081508.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4016060309.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4023120617.md)

## API 列表
### 投放计划
- [创建投放计划](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381114.md)
- [分页查询投放计划列表](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381151.md)
- [提交投放计划](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381190.md)
- [暂停投放计划](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381165.md)
- [恢复投放计划](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381172.md)
- [更新投放计划](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381209.md)
- [终止投放计划](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381201.md)
- [设置投放计划回调地址](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381183.md)
- [投放计划状态变更通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018869623.md)

- [创建投放计划 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381114-go.md)
- [恢复投放计划 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381172-curl.md)
- [恢复投放计划 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381172-java.md)
- [恢复投放计划 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381172-go.md)
- [提交投放计划 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381190-curl.md)
- [提交投放计划 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381190-java.md)
- [提交投放计划 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381190-go.md)
- [暂停投放计划 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381165-curl.md)
- [暂停投放计划 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381165-java.md)
- [暂停投放计划 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381165-go.md)
- [更新投放计划 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381209-curl.md)
- [更新投放计划 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381209-java.md)
- [更新投放计划 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381209-go.md)
- [终止投放计划 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381201-curl.md)
- [终止投放计划 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381201-java.md)
- [终止投放计划 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381201-go.md)
- [设置投放计划回调地址 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381183-curl.md)
- [设置投放计划回调地址 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381183-java.md)
- [设置投放计划回调地址 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/brand/4018381183-go.md)
